name_en: !!️《Complete Original Retail Packaging》!!️【New】This GG Marmont chain wallet is crafted with care from Matelassé leather. The series' iconic double G accessories make the design even more full.
name_cn:
!!️《Complete Original Retail Packaging》!!️【New】This GG Marmont chain wallet is crafted with care from Matelassé leather. The series' iconic double G accessories make the design even more full.
Yellow quilted V-shaped leather
Silver-tone hardware
Yellow taffeta lining
Double G
Interior: 12 card slots and 3 coin slip pockets
Full zip coin pocket
Model: 837758
Size: 19cm (W) x 10.5cm (H) x 2cm (D)
Color: Yellow full leather
Made in Italy
